name: PartyWoo White Balloons 140 pcs Different Sizes of 18 12 10 5 Inch White Balloons Arch Kit Garland for Wedding Baby Shower Birthday Bridal Shower Graduation Engagement Party Decorations White-Y13
bullets: Package includes: 18 inch white balloons (5 pcs), 12 inch white balloons (30 pcs), 10 inch white balloons (40 pcs), 5 inch white balloons (65 pcs), suitable for parties, pay attentions that the 5 inch balloons could NOT float when inflated with HELIUM.

Thick Durable Latex: These white balloons are made with high quality thick material, each balloon stays full longer perfect for arches garlands centerpieces.Ensuring your graduation, engagement decorations stays perfect from setup to celebration end.

What To Fill With: These white balloons filled with AIR will stay full for up to 72 hours, and have standard balloon necks, allowing quick inflation. These mustard balloons can bringing joy to your birthday party, wedding, baby shower decorations.

Attention & Warning: Please DO NOT overfill the white balloons and also avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Control the amount of air inflated into each balloon to achieve your ideal balloon size, enjoy your birthday party.

Perfect for Multiple Occasions: Whether it's a wedding decorations, baby shower decorations, birthday decorations, bridal shower decorations, graduation engagement decorations, these white balloons are ideal and making your event more memorable.

reviews.name: Briona
reviews.title: Good Quality Balloons
reviews.body: These balloons turned out absolutely beautiful! The colors were vibrant, the quality was great, and they were very easy to assemble. They held air well throughout the entire event and made the perfect addition to our setup. I also loved that there was a good variety of sizes included, which made creating the balloon arrangement so much easier. Definitely a great value for the price, and I would…

reviews.name: K. McNett
reviews.title: Stretchy and sturdy
reviews.body: I was impressed with these PartyWoo balloons!I have purchased a lot of different balloon arch kits with varying degrees of quality. These were awesome.I purchased black (y18), yellow (y55), and red (y75) which is more of a burgundy or wine red (exactly what I wanted). The product photos showing comparison colors with respective number ID side by side really helped me decide on the shade of red to…

reviews.name: Dashae Coley-Epps
reviews.title: I swear by partywoo!
reviews.body: I literally swear by partywoo balloons for event setups! Durable & great quality. Love the variety of colors. The colors always come as pictured. Partywoo balloons look great without balloon spray but even better with! (Pictured is without balloon spray.) I’d 100% recommend.

reviews.name: Whitney
reviews.title: These Balloons are Great!
reviews.body: These balloons were awesome to work with! I was able to fill and create clusters the day before, then assemble the garland the following day.I purchased three seperate colors; black, dark green, and silver. I loved having the four different sizes to work with. The colors were bright and and really stood out in the room. The silver color didn't hold air overnight as well as the other colors, but I…
